rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0010
rows.name: Good work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0020
rows.name:
We've moved the Ares to the
quarantine hangar for analysis.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0030
rows.name: However...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0040
rows.name:
For the Ghosts to go chasing
after the Vita like that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0050
rows.name:
Does that mean they consider the
Growth a bigger threat than us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0060
rows.name: The Ghosts don't possess that kind of will.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0070
rows.name:
They simply swarm whatever target is in front of them,
like matter of opposing polarities drawn to one another.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0080
rows.name:
Their behavior is closer
to a natural phenomenon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0090
rows.name:
The final conclusion the researchers
on my planet reached was...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0100
rows.name:
that the Ghosts are something like a
system designed to correct the world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0110
rows.name: That was their answer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0120
rows.name: A system?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0130
rows.name: We had something like that on Earth, too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0140
rows.name:
Is it like animal instincts that actually
exist to protect the environment?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0150
rows.name: "And the sixth angel sounded,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0160
rows.name:
"and I heard a voice from the four horns
of the golden altar which is before God,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0170
rows.name:
"saying to the sixth angel
which had the trumpet,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0180
rows.name:
"'Loose the four angels which are
bound in the great river Euphrates.'[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0190
rows.name: "That's how the verse goes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0200
rows.name: "And the four angels were loosed,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0210
rows.name:
"which were prepared for an hour, and a day, and a
month, and a year, for to slay the third part of men."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0220
rows.name: That's[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0230
rows.name:
Hearing it from you really
puts me in a solemn mood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0240
rows.name:
A passage from a text passed down
since antiquity in your world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0250
rows.name: Morals and admonitions[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0260
rows.name:
When I first read it, I felt it was
a book recording such things, but[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0270
rows.name:
You think it may actually
have recorded a prophecy?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0280
rows.name: You could even call it a record of fact.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0290
rows.name: [ST:undisp ][ST:wide ]―?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0300
rows.name: What if...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0310
rows.name:
What if the people of the past
actually knew about that "system"?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0320
rows.name:
You're saying those things are
the angels of the apocalypse?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0330
rows.name: No way[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0340
rows.name: Is Kamisama real too, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0350
rows.name:
The events currently taking
place match the description.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0360
rows.name: Gods and angels...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0370
rows.name: Before, I would have laughed it off, but[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0390
rows.name: Well, whatever the case...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0400
rows.name:
The fact that the Ghosts are chasing
the Growth is good news for us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0410
rows.name: I'll let you know if we learn anything else.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0420
rows.name: For now, get some rest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0430
rows.name: Understood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0440
rows.name: Al, you're up for a physical examination.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0450
rows.name: I'm perfectly healthy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0460
rows.name: That's exactly why.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0470
rows.name: Come on, back me up here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31120100_MSG0480
rows.name: Off you go.[ST:wait ]
